title: Use `except Exception as some_name` consistently and log errors using exc_info

issues.body: I think there’s some adjustements needed in this block - eg `raise` May need to be `raise exc from None`. I’d double check how the behaviour looks in a browser with a simple app that raises an exception: possible our test cases are dealing with ensuring the correct behaviour fully. Similarly I *expe
Again, do we need an explicit `raise exc from None` here now?
